# internal-artifact-mapping.txt
#
# Maps vendor jars in libs/ to their Maven coordinates so that
# install-internal-deps.sh can install them into the local Maven repository
# before the CI build runs.
#
# FORMAT (pipe-delimited, one entry per line):
#   relative-jar-path|groupId|artifactId|version|packaging|classifier
#
# - relative-jar-path : path from the repository root to the jar file
#                       (e.g. libs/mylib-1.0.0.jar)
# - groupId           : Maven groupId
# - artifactId        : Maven artifactId
# - version           : Maven version string
# - packaging         : usually "jar"
# - classifier        : optional; leave the field empty if not needed
#
# HOW TO ADD A NEW MAPPING:
#   1. Copy the private jar into the libs/ directory.
#   2. Add a line below following the format above.
#   3. Commit both the jar and this file.
#
# NOTE: Lines starting with '#' and blank lines are ignored.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

# com.projectgoth internal libraries
libs/com.projectgoth-configuration-1.0.5.jar|com.projectgoth|configuration|1.0.5|jar|
libs/com.projectgoth-common-lib-0.0.3.jar|com.projectgoth|common-lib|0.0.3|jar|
libs/com.projectgoth-hashtag-0.0.2.jar|com.projectgoth|hashtag|0.0.2|jar|
libs/com.projectgoth-s3uploader-0.0.1.jar|com.projectgoth|s3uploader|0.0.1|jar|
libs/com.projectgoth-leto-common-0.27.0.jar|com.projectgoth|leto-common|0.27.0|jar|

# ICE middleware (platform-specific builds — add whichever platform applies)
# NOTE: Do NOT change the ICE groupId/version used in pom.xml; update only the
#       jar file and this mapping to match the platform profile being built.
libs/Ice-3.3.1-mac.jar|com.zeroc.mac|Ice|3.3.1|jar|
# libs/Ice-3.3.1-linux.jar|com.zeroc.linux|Ice|3.3.1|jar|

# mig33 RabbitMQ client
libs/mig33rabbitmq-client-0.5.0.jar|com.mig33|mig33rabbitmq-client|0.5.0|jar|

# SWT (platform-specific — uncomment the one matching your build profile)
libs/swt-macosx-3.3.1.1.jar|swt|swt-macosx|3.3.1.1|jar|
# libs/swt-linux-3.3.1.1.jar|swt|swt-linux|3.3.1.1|jar|

# Berkeley DB Java Edition
libs/je-3.3.74.jar|berkeley|je|3.3.74|jar|

# Add mappings for any additional private jars below this line.
# Example:
#   libs/my-internal-lib-2.0.0.jar|com.example|my-internal-lib|2.0.0|jar|
